news.headline: Tune in to Insight with Haslinda Amin on 12/12/2024 for the latest updates.
Global Commercial HVAC market to reach USD 78,450.1 million by 2033 with a 2.5% CAGR. Demand was USD 61,285.1 million in 2023.
news.summary: The research report by Custom Market Insights highlights the growth and trends in the global Commercial HVAC Market. In 2023, the market was valued at approximately USD 61,285.1 Million and is projected to reach USD 78,450.1 Million by 2033, with a compound annual growth rate of about 2.5%. Factors driving this growth include technological advancements, regulatory standards promoting energy efficiency and sustainability, urbanization and infrastructure development, renovation projects, and a focus on indoor air quality. Emerging markets in Asia-Pacific and Latin America, energy management, and the integration of renewable energy sources also contribute to market growth. Smart building trends and IoT technology are influencing the market as well. Companies like Trane and Mitsubishi Electric Trane HVAC US have launched innovative products aimed at enhancing energy efficiency and environmental sustainability. The report covers market size, growth projections, key segments, and regional scope across North America, Europe, Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa, and South & Central America.

news.headline: Systemair buys last 10% of Systemair HSK Türkiye shares from Eroğlu family. Initial stake was 70% in 2012.
news.summary: In Skinnskatteberg, Sweden, on December 12, 2024, Systemair (traded as SYSR on NASDAQ OMX Stockholm) has completed the acquisition of the final 10 percent of shares in Systemair HSK Türkiye from the Eroğlu founding family. The initial ownership deal occurred in August 2012 when Systemair AB acquired 70 percent of the company.

news.headline: IDEX Biometrics ASA issued two warrants, Warrants A and B, to subscribers in Private Placement and Subsequent Offering completed in 2024.
news.summary: Regarding the private placement conducted by IDEX Biometrics ASA on September 17, 2024, followed by a subsequent offering on November 29, 2024, subscribers were granted two warrants, Warrants A and Warrants B (together known as the “Warrants”), for every two Offer Shares they acquired in the Private Placement and the Subsequent Offering. The Company intends to make arrangements for the Warrants to be tradable on Euronext Oslo Børs, as previously stated.

news.headline: ONWARD Medical recognized as top 15% globally for corporate sustainability, achieving outstanding performance.
2024 DIA held at China Academy of Art in Hangzhou. GR-1 robot wins Grand Award. ceremony at CAA's Liangzhu Campus on Dec 6.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, the 2024 Design Intelligence Award (DIA) ceremony was held at the Liangzhu Campus of China Academy of Art in Hangzhou, China. The Fourier General-Purpose Humanoid Robot GR-1 was awarded the prestigious Grand Award, the highest honor at DIA. This recognition highlights the exceptional design and innovation of the robot.

news.headline: Vancouver approves motion for becoming a Bitcoin-friendly city with 6 councilors in favor and 2 against due to concerns.
news.summary: The motion was backed by six councilors while two councilors opposed it due to worries about the potential of digital assets for illicit activities and the environmental consequences of mining.

Dutch Trade Balance Actual 13.003B (Forecast -, Previous 13.934B)
Japan's Coincheck crypto exchange listed on Nasdaq after merging with Thunder Bridge Capital Partners IV. Ticker: "CNCK."
news.summary: On Wednesday, Japan's Coincheck cryptocurrency exchange began trading on the Nasdaq stock exchange after merging with Thunder Bridge Capital Partners IV. The holding company, Coincheck Group N.V. (NASDAQ: CNCK), facilitated this merger, enabling trading under the ticker "CNCK." This move marks a significant milestone for the Tokyo-based firm, now listed on Nasdaq. The merger paves the way for further growth opportunities for Coincheck in the global market. For more details, refer to the complete story on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Filecoin (FIL) marks 100th edition with cross-chain innovations, partnerships, and storage advancements. Important milestone achieved.
news.summary: The latest update on Filecoin (FIL) News, the 100th edition, showcases groundbreaking developments in cross-chain technologies, strategic collaborations, and progress in decentralized storage and AI. This edition is a significant milestone for the Filecoin ecosystem, emphasizing the importance of these advancements.

news.headline: Prospectus published for reverse cross-border legal merger with Vastned Retail, 14,390,507 new shares to be traded on Euronext Brussels and 19,469,032 shares on Euronext Amsterdam.
news.summary: Vastned Belgium, parent company of Vastned Retail, is set to undergo a reverse cross-border legal merger on January 1, 2025. After meeting standard conditions, Vastned Belgium will merge into Vastned Retail. In preparation for this move, Vastned Belgium has released a prospectus today, detailing the admission to trade 14,390,507 new shares on Euronext Brussels, with an additional 19,469,032 shares to be listed on Euronext Amsterdam as a secondary trading option. The merger aims to streamline operations and enhance market presence for the companies involved.

news.headline: EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS earned EUR 2,602k rental income in November, up EUR 32k from October, with a vacancy rate of 3.0%.
news.summary: In November, EfTEN Real Estate Fund AS generated total rental income of EUR 2,602 thousand, showing a EUR 32 thousand rise from October. This growth in rental earnings is primarily due to the inclusion of the Härgmäe logistics center's full-month rental income following a recent investment. Moreover, the increased rental income can be attributed to a reduced vacancy rate at the Evolution office building in Vilnius. The fund's investment portfolio saw a decrease in vacancy rate to 3.0% in November, down from 3.2% in October.

CBC Group R-Bridge Healthcare Fund offers up to US$50M financing to Human Investments Ltd. for Motiva® expansion in Asia.
news.summary: Human Investments Ltd. secured non-dilutive growth financing totaling up to US$50 million, which includes a synthetic royalty component tied to specific sales achievements. The funding will support the company's efforts to expand its Motiva® devices in Asia. This transaction also showcases R-Bridge's involvement in facilitating the financing deal.

news.headline: SEC Commissioner Crenshaw's committee vote delayed, jeopardizing renomination; uncertain future at agency. #SEC #Crenshaw
news.summary: Commissioner Caroline Crenshaw of the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is facing uncertainty in her position at the agency after the vote on her renomination was delayed. The postponement has left her future at the SEC in question, with important decisions hanging in the balance.

news.headline: Bitcoin hits $100k price milestone, signaling a new era in crypto adoption with network growth and institutional interest.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has exceeded $100,000, a major milestone in the cryptocurrency's journey. This surge is attributed to the strong expansion of its network, widespread adoption by institutions, and a notable increase in market capitalization.

news.headline: Berlin's Vay transforms remote driving using NVIDIA DRIVE AGX, enhancing mobility with AI and real-time teledriving.
news.summary: A new remote driving solution has been rolled out by Vay, a Berlin-based company. This innovative technology utilizes NVIDIA DRIVE AGX to enhance mobility through real-time teledriving and AI features. This advancement showcases Vay's dedication to pushing the boundaries of modern automotive technology.

news.headline: IMX sets new records in 2024 with over 250 game signings, establishing dominance in web3 gaming. #Crypto #IMX #Web3
news.summary: Immutable (IMX) has inked deals with a record number of games in 2024, surpassing the total from all previous years combined. This further cements its dominant position in the web3 gaming sector, as it has successfully onboarded over 250 new titles.

news.headline: Japan government bond futures rise, recovering from earlier decline
Fashion model and designer Suede Brooks to receive Faraday Future's FF 91 2.0 on Dec 12 in Los Angeles.
news.summary: LOS ANGELES--Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. (NASDAQ: FFIE), a California-based global shared intelligent electric mobility ecosystem company, revealed that Suede Brooks, a notable YouTube personality, fashion model, and designer, will receive her new FF 91 2.0 Futurist Alliance EV during an event with FF executives on Thursday, December 12, in suburban Los Angeles. Brooks, known for her strong social media following, will be presented with the innovative electric vehicle at the ceremony.

RMIT's Blockchain Hub to become part-time due to resource constraints, changing in 2025.
news.summary: The specialized form of the Blockchain Innovation Hub at RMIT University, known for its pioneering work in blockchain technology, will be discontinued by the year 2025.

Frax Finance unveils 2025 roadmap with initiatives like token upgrades & hard fork to boost DeFi adoption.
news.summary: Frax Finance has unveiled its ambitious vision for 2025, which includes a multitude of initiatives aimed at propelling the decentralized finance (DeFi) sector forward. Among the key updates are token upgrades, the implementation of Fraxtal North Star Hard Fork, and the introduction of a simplified universal interface. These strategic moves are designed to pave the way for increased adoption of DeFi. The announcement was made in Las Vegas on December 12, 2024. This development sets the stage for significant changes in the crypto landscape in the coming year.

news.headline: Almasane Alkobra granted license for minerals in Al Baha province
Japan, UK, Italy to invest equally in fighter jet joint venture: Nikkei
Prepare for more frequent extreme weather by packing a ‘Go Bag’.Experts recommend being ready for any situation.
news.summary: Experts warn that if current patterns persist, instances of severe weather events are expected to increase significantly. This heightened frequency may lead to more frequent natural disasters and climate-related emergencies. It is advised by experts to be prepared by creating emergency kits with essential supplies, developing evacuation plans, and staying informed about weather alerts. Taking these proactive measures can help individuals and communities mitigate the potential impact of extreme weather events in the future.

news.headline: New Zealand Finance Minister Nicola Willis speaks in an interview.
Willis of New Zealand: Visa alterations to be revealed soon
New Zealand to Revamp Golden Visa Program to Attract Affluent Immigrants
BriaCell Therapeutics prices $5.5M public offering of 7.4M shares at $0.75/share with warrants; expected to close on Dec. 13.
news.summary: BriaCell Therapeutics Corp, a clinical-stage biotechnology company, announced a public offering of 7.4 million common shares and warrants at $0.75 per share, with each warrant exercisable at $0.9375 per share for five years. The total gross proceeds from the offering are expected to be approximately $5.55 million. The offering is set to close on December 13, 2024. The Company is utilizing an exemption in the TSX Company Manual for interlisted issuers on recognized exchanges like Nasdaq.

news.headline: Shiba Inu cryptocurrency surges 10%, outpacing Dogecoin, with analyst predicting 180% upside to $0.000081.
news.summary: Shiba Inu (CRYPTO: SHIB), a popular dog-themed cryptocurrency, experienced a significant spike on Wednesday amidst a general market upsurge. The meme coin, currently the second-largest by market capitalization, surged over 10% in the past 24 hours, surpassing its counterpart Dogecoin (CRYPTO: DOGE). This surge followed Bitcoin's rise above $100,000, which ignited a broader market rally. Renowned analyst JAVON MARKS predicted a substantial upward movement for SHIB, setting a target price of $0.000081. The analyst's forecast has drawn attention as investors anticipate potential gains.

news.headline: Larry Summers warns Trump's policies could lead to higher inflation than seen in Biden's term, impacting investors.
news.summary: Larry Summers, former U.S. Treasury Secretary, expressed concerns on Wednesday regarding the economic policies proposed by President-elect Donald Trump, stating that they could lead to more significant inflation than that observed during President Joe Biden's term. Summers highlighted the potential risks for investors and markets due to Trump's suggested plan, which includes maintaining tax cuts, imposing broad tariffs, and the possibility of reducing the labor force through deportation. Summers emphasized that if Trump's program is executed as described during the campaign, the inflationary impact would be notably higher than what was seen under Biden in 2021. The caution from Summers comes at a time when current Treasury Secretary Janet Yellen...

news.headline: OpenAI issues apology for ChatGPT outage post Apple update merging Siri, affecting globally at 11:07 pm UTC on Dec. 11; now restoring in select regions.
news.summary: Global outage of ChatGPT occurred at approximately 11:07 pm UTC on December 11 but is gradually being restored in certain parts of the world.

news.headline: Nutanix prices $750M 0.50% convertible senior notes due 2029, with option for additional $112.5M, expected to settle on Dec 16.
news.summary: Nutanix, Inc., a prominent player in hybrid multicloud computing, has revealed today the pricing details of their latest financial move. In a private placement to qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A of the Securities Act of 1933, the company announced the pricing of $750 million aggregate principal amount of 0.50% convertible senior notes due 2029. There is also an option for the initial purchasers to buy up to an additional $112.5 million aggregate principal amount of the notes within a 13-day window from the initial issuance date. The settlement of the notes to the initial purchasers is scheduled for December 16, 2024, pending the fulfillment of customary closing conditions.

news.headline: New in the US: American Egg Board launches "Tower of Eggs" in Roblox with obstacle gameplay and recipe challenges.
Youths from Taiwan Straits bond over shared digital trends, using buzzwords like "Po Fang"; increasing emotional resonance.
news.summary: On December 12, 2024, in Beijing, it was reported that young people from both sides of the Taiwan Straits, who share a common language and cultural heritage, are connecting emotionally through similar online buzzwords. This trend is fueled by the rise of digital interactions, with an increasing number of youths participating. The term "Po Fang" has gained popularity as a shared expression of emotion and resonance among these individuals.
